text_original: achei um bom app até descobrir que tem que espera 24h para conversar mais no chat comum , totalmente fora da realidade . vc já tem gasto para tudo e ainda ter que gastar para usar o chat e ridículo
text_zh: 我觉得这是一个不错的应用，直到发现必须等待24小时才能在普通聊天中继续对话，这完全脱离现实。你已经为所有事情花钱了，还要为使用聊天功能花钱，这太荒谬了。
reply_original: Hi, thanks for your feedback! We understand your frustration about the 24h wait for chats. Please note: VIP members enjoy unlimited chats without delays. If you're a free user, this restriction applies. To remove this limitation, consider upgrading to VIP. For further assistance, please contact support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 你好，感谢你的反馈！我们理解你对聊天需要等待24小时的不满。请注意：VIP会员可享受无限次聊天且无延迟。如果你是免费用户，此限制将适用。如需解除此限制，请考虑升级为VIP。如需进一步帮助，请联系support@fantachat.ai。
